transcript: Here's another 20 minute air fryer recipe, crispy garlic tofu. Cut tofu into 1 inch cube and soak the tofu in salt water for 5 minutes. This will make the tofu crispy on the outside, juicy on the inside. Air fry at 400 for 20 minutes and in the meantime, prepare the sauce. Add in garlic, green onion, red chili, sesame seeds, and hot oil. Then add in soy sauce, sugar, oyster sauce, and cilantro. And that's it! If you're looking for an easy recipe,

Then add in soy sauce, sugar, oyster sauce, and cilantro.
